temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A man in a dark suit and white shirt rides a bicycle with a small front basket down a dirt road. The road is surrounded by dry, golden fields under a clear blue sky with a few white clouds. (Storyline: The scene introduces the main character, establishing a seemingly normal, everyday moment of him cycling through the countryside.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: Upbeat, energetic rock music with a driving drum beat and electric guitar begins to play.)
(00:02-00:04) A white pickup truck, with two open, empty animal transport cages on its bed, drives down the same dirt road. The cages are covered with tarps, and a small, fluffy dog can be seen peeking out from one of them. (Storyline: This introduces a mysterious element. The empty animal cages suggest that something has happened, possibly involving the man on the bicycle and the dog.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The upbeat rock music continues.)
